description: Hand-labeled prompts for axios/axios (JS HTTP client). 12 descriptive prompts. expected_files identified by reading the repo at SHA afca61a0.

prompts.prompt: manager that stores request and response interceptors and runs them in a chain
where is the function that actually sends the prepared request through the configured adapter
adapter that uses Node http module to send requests
adapter that uses XMLHttpRequest in the browser
adapter built on top of the fetch API
how are default config and per-request config merged
the custom error class that carries request and response on failure
the class that stores and normalizes HTTP headers
helper that serializes a params object into a URL query string
combines baseURL and request URL into the final absolute URL
resolves or rejects the promise based on the HTTP status code validator
